text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Kawakami Princess is leaping about on
the roof of the school.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Listen to this! I received a super wonderful fan
letter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Kawakami Princess, I admire your fierce
running and indomitable spirit...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I also love the way you mow down your
competition on the track. I want you to know I,
too, am training to become a mighty princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I hope one day to challenge you to a princess
showdown. Please keep up your diligent training
until that time! Yours sincerely."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No! My ideal image of a princess has been passed
on to a new princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My fans now understand that a princess should be
strong and resolute!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
When I read this, I was so overjoyed that I almost
burst through the classroom wall!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's why I came out here—to calm myself down!
But I can't seem to calm down at all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I feel like I'm about to erupt with joy!
There's only one thing for it...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll just have to burn off all this excess energy!
Let's go! Princess Dash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From this day on, Kawakami Princess becomes
even more devoted to her training.
